title: Croatian Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Croatia, made with tender beef and a rich blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef in batches until browned on all sides. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the browned beef back to the pot, along with the red wine, beef broth, thyme, and paprika.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake for 2-1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
